name: pict-section-flow-example-simple-cards
description: Pict Section Flow - Simple Cards Example Application

ExampleApplication.Title: Simple Cards
ExampleApplication.Summary: Twelve custom PictFlowCard subclasses across six categories — every panel type (Markdown / Template / Form / View), every BodyContent renderer (SVG / HTML / Canvas), wrapped in a multi-page Pict shell with router-driven navigation and a curated sample-graph catalog.

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>
